items.text: Read context: squire-adapter/todo.json sa-4 exact wording, squire-adapter/decisions.md streaming/finalize_turn design, rejection-ux/decisions.md's sa-4 deferral note, context_squire_spec_v2.md sigil syntax (§5) and display-boundary guarantee (§14)

Read the actual code: squire.rs (finalize_turn/expand_for_display in full), streaming_cmd.rs (StreamEvent::Chunk handling and context_mode branch points), frontend stream-listeners.ts (stream-chunk consumer)
Verify baseline: cargo build + cargo test --lib clean, matches handoff.md's 149/149

Design and document the fix approach in decisions.md before implementing: chose full live-stream suppression in Squire mode (task's option 1 / sa-4's own prescribed fix), rejected incremental sigil-masking and incremental deterministic expansion as overengineering for a display-boundary bug

Implement: add should_stream_live_chunks(context_mode) pure helper in streaming_cmd.rs; gate the main StreamEvent::Chunk emission plus the two tool-loop-path stream-chunk emissions (tool-call separator, [Executing...] progress line) on it; Legacy mode behavior unchanged
Add unit tests for should_stream_live_chunks (Legacy -> true, Squire -> false) in streaming_cmd.rs's new test module
Full verification: cargo build + cargo build --bins clean/zero warnings; cargo test --lib all passing (149 baseline + 2 new = 151)
Attempt manual verification in a running app instance (tauri dev, send a Squire-mode message, watch for raw sigils mid-stream); document outcome in state.md
Update root/Squire/state.md Child Nodes list and root/Squire/handoff.md to reflect this session's work, current build/test status, and remaining backlog with sa-4 marked resolved
